query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS house_document_vaults (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  house_id INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  vault_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  vault_hash VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  total_documents INT DEFAULT 0,
  total_storage_bytes BIGINT DEFAULT 0,
  storage_quota_bytes BIGINT DEFAULT 10737418240,
  encryption_enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  encryption_key_hash VARCHAR(64),
  vault_status ENUM('active', 'locked', 'archived') DEFAULT 'active',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS house_document_vaults (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  house_id INT NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  vault_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  vault_hash VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL,
  total_documents INT DEFAULT 0,
  total_storage_bytes BIGINT DEFAULT 0,
  storage_quota_bytes BIGINT DEFAULT 10737418240,
  encryption_enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  encryption_key_hash VARCHAR(64),
  vault_status ENUM('active', 'locked', 'archived') DEFAULT 'active',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
)
